prompt: A full-body anime fantasy warrior girl standing alone on a plain light gray background, clean character illustration with soft painterly rendering and crisp line art. She is a slender young woman with long straight platinum blonde hair, center-parted with long face-framing strands and a small tied section at the back, light amber-brown eyes, fair skin, and a calm slightly serious expression. Her pose is dynamic and confident: legs apart in a stable stance, one arm raised over her head gripping a long spear shaft behind her shoulders, the other hand holding the spear lower near her side so the ornate spear extends diagonally across the composition. The weapon is 1 elaborate dark metallic spear with a long narrow blade, cross-shaped barbs, engraved gothic details, and a sharp butt spike. Her outfit is a refined dark fantasy battle costume with exactly 6 visible main pieces: 1 black steel armored right arm gauntlet with engraved plating, 1 fitted black-and-bronze corset breastplate, 1 white high-neck blouse with sheer long sleeves, 1 short asymmetrical white skirt with flowing split overskirt panels, 1 pair of black thigh-high armored boots with silver filigree knee and ankle accents, and 1 brown belt set with straps including a right-thigh garter strap. Add subtle silver ornamentation at the collar and armor edges, elegant leather textures, polished metal highlights, and gently wind-swept fabric. Keep the palette muted and sophisticated in ivory, charcoal, bronze, and silver. The style should feel like premium Japanese RPG character concept art, highly detailed, graceful, slightly gothic, isolated full figure, no extra props, no scenery, only a faint soft ground shadow beneath her feet.
